matches.title: Is Alphabet (GOOGL) Still Attractively Priced After AI Headlines And Recent Share Pullback
matches.text: If you are wondering whether Alphabet is still attractively priced after its long run, this article will walk through what the current share price may be implying about value. The stock closed at US$303.58, with returns of 78.3% over 1 year and 225.9% over 3 years, even as the last 7 days and 30 days showed returns of 2.4% decline and 10.2% decline, and year to date it is at a 3.7% decline.
